message:
🌱 Add podman-container-tools: Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive mission (#1178)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-8323-unable-to-authenticate-with-podman-remote-over-ssh-t",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive remote podman.sock",
+    "description": "Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive remote podman.sock. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for error: ````Error: Failed to create sshClient: Connection to bastion host (ssh://ben@192.168.2.186:22/run/user/1000/podman/podman`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**\r\n\n**Description**\n\nTrying to run Podman on a remote machine and use the podman-remote client to drive it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive…",
+        "description": "```\n$ podman --log-level=debug ps                                                                                                    [9:59:16]\nINFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug\nDEBU[0000] Called ps.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=debug ps)\nDEBU[0000] Found SSH_AUTH_SOCK\n```yaml\n**Describe the results you expected:**\n\nI expected `podman-remote ps` to behave normally, outputting something like this:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that ````Error: Failed to create sshClient: Connection to bastion host (ssh://ben@192.168.2.186:22/run/user/1000/podman/podman` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "```\n$ podman --log-level=debug ps                                                                                                    [9:59:16]\nINFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug\nDEBU[0000] Called ps.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=debug ps)\nDEBU[0000] Found SSH_AUTH_SOCK \"/private/tmp/com.apple.launchd.VBspeEuRIU/Listeners\", ssh-agent signer enabled\nError: Failed to create",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "**Describe the results you expected:**\n\nI expected `podman-remote ps` to behave normally, outputting something like this:",
+        "**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**\n\nI also tried adding the connection with an explicit identity file instead of relying on the SSH agent:",
+        "**Output of `podman info --debug`:**"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "podman-container-tools",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },
